candidate_definitions.text: A world-class collection of Claude Code utilities: autonomous skills, expert agents, slash commands, and prompts that supercharge your development workflow
> A world-class collection of Claude Code utilities: autonomous skills, expert agents, slash commands, and prompts that supercharge your development workflow.

> A curated list of tools, frameworks, and resources for **agent harness engineering** — the discipline of designing environments, constraints, and feedback loops that make AI coding agents reliable at scale.
